item.title: The Only All-in-One Tool You Will Ever Need
item.description: There are many A-I-O available out there, but what if you could use only one ultimate A-I-O tool?

item.title: Three Years of Using Obsidian - Everything into a Vault Template
item.description: Possibilities are infinite, but many are out of scope. Great Obsidian experience will be much simpler to achieve with these tips!

item.title: How To Setup Taskwarrior Server In 2025
item.description: Learn how to sync your tasks the right way!

item.title: Regain Control Over What You Watch in YouTube
item.description: Make yourself a step from being lured by useless recommendations in YouTube with Invidious

item.title: How to Install Spelling in Neovim
item.description: Neovim does not have support for spelling other than English by default. Here are how you can get the required files to enable spelling in Neovim.

item.title: NixOS - Usage Review
item.description: Here are my thoughts on the amazing NixOS distro, which takes system configuration to another level, plus it’s main principles of reproducibility and reliability.
